nasb.text: They went up and camped at Kiriath-jearim in Judah. Therefore they called that place Mahaneh-dan to this day; behold, it is west of Kiriath-jearim.

esv.text: and went up and encamped at Kiriath-jearim in Judah. On this account that place is called Mahaneh-dan to this day; behold, it is west of Kiriath-jearim.

cnv.text: 他們上去，在猶大的基列．耶琳安營；因此人把那地方叫作瑪哈尼．但，直到現在；這地方是在基列．耶琳的西邊。

ccb.text: 他们来到犹大  基列·耶琳的西边安营。因此，那地方至今仍叫玛哈尼·但。
